title: COPY INTO: Backslash preceding field separator kills import
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_import(a String, b Int32, c Float64 DEFAULT 0.0, d UInt8 NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_import WHERE b > 1 AND d IS NOT NULL;
INSERT INTO test_import SELECT * FROM file('/path/to/data.csv', 'CSV', 'a String, b Int32, c Float64, d UInt8');
key_bug_features: Backslash before field separator disrupts data import
